subject: [PATCH v2] mm/hugetlb: fix swap entry corruption when clearing uffd-wp at fork()

2026-07-08.patch_summary: The patch fixes a swap entry corruption issue when clearing the uffd-wp bit at fork() in hugetlb pages. The problem arises from the different handling of the uffd-wp bit in migration and hwpoison entries, leading to incorrect clear operations. The patch corrects this by using pte_swp_clear_uffd_wp() for migration entries and removing the unnecessary clear operation on hwpoison entries.
